channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fossilised Lystrosaurus Embryo Confirms Egg-Laying Behaviour in Mammal Ancestors
item.description: Researchers have discovered a 250-million-year-old fossilised embryo of Lystrosaurus in the Eastern Cape, South Africa, offering the earliest direct evidence that mammal ancestors laid eggs. The fossi...

item.title: Two suspects remain at large after 2023 gold heist at Pearson Airport
item.description: Two suspects, Simran Preet Panesar and Prasath Paramalingam, are still on the run almost three years after the infamous gold heist at Toronto Pearson International Airport. The heist, which took place...

item.title: Tanzania’s Vision 2050 faces institutional challenges despite strong audit scores
item.description: On April 1, 2026, Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba officially launched Tanzania’s Vision 2050, a 25-year plan targeting a $1 trillion economy and $7,000 per capita income, backed by a record Sh61.9 tril...

item.title: Malacañang affirms Safer Cities Initiative aims to protect citizens, not discriminate against the poor
item.description: Malacañang has defended the Department of the Interior and Local Government’s (DILG) Safer Cities Initiative after several groups expressed concern that the program might unfairly target lower-income ...

item.title: Canada's labour market shows modest recovery with 14,000 jobs added in March as unemployment holds at 6.7%
item.description: According to Statistics Canada, the Canadian economy added 14,000 jobs in March 2026, following a significant loss of 84,000 positions in February. Despite the modest gain, overall employment remained...

item.title: Saab Proposes Secure Data Centre in Montreal to Compete with F-35 Fighter Jet Deal
item.description: In a strategic move to secure Canada’s fighter jet contract, Saab has offered to establish a secure, sovereign data centre in Montreal to house critical mission data. This would ensure the sensitive i...

item.title: Offset Seeks DNA Test for Cardi B's Child Amid Divorce Drama
item.description: The ongoing legal drama between Cardi B and her ex-husband Offset has taken another turn after reports revealed that Offset sought a DNA test to confirm the paternity of Cardi B's fourth child with NF...

item.title: Australia and Singapore strengthen energy trade and supply chain cooperation
item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese met with his Singaporean counterpart Lawrence Wong to discuss strengthening the energy supply chain between the two nations. Talks focused on increasing Aust...

item.title: Iran's Social Media Strategy Outpaces Western Diplomacy
item.description: Iran has demonstrated a marked advantage in the digital information space, leveraging social media platforms like X, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube to shape global narratives in near real-time. Irania...

item.title: Strait of Hormuz sees minimal traffic despite ceasefire
item.description: Despite the ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran, traffic through the strategic Strait of Hormuz remains minimal. Just 10 vessels have passed since the truce came into effect, with m...

item.title: India expresses concern over high civilian casualties in Lebanon amid Israeli strikes
item.description: India has expressed serious concern over the high number of civilian casualties in Lebanon following extensive bombing by Israeli forces, which have killed 1,800 people and injured over 5,800 in the p...

item.title: Rivers State University Launches 2026-2030 Strategic Plan to Drive Excellence and Growth
item.description: Rivers State University (RSU) for Port Harcourt don officially unveil im Third Five-Year Strategic Development Plan wey go run from 2026 to 2030. The plan na comprehensive roadmap to make the universi...

item.title: Seven Overlooked Mario Games Worth Rediscovering
item.description: With the recent success of The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, Nintendo’s legendary plumber remains a cultural icon 45 years after his debut. While some Mario titles are household names, a number of lesser-...

item.title: Governor Lusaka reshuffles Bungoma leadership after performance review
item.description: Bungoma Governor Kenneth Lusaka has caused ripples in local politics after dismissing all members of his County Executive Committee together with several senior officers. The governor made the decisio...

item.title: Britain commemorates Queen Elizabeth II’s centenary, highlighting her style and legacy
item.description: Britain is marking the 100th anniversary of Queen Elizabeth II's birth by celebrating her enduring influence as a style icon. The late Queen, who reigned for over 70 years, left a profound legacy not ...

item.title: Cameron Bukowski could fill in as Broncos hooker amid injury crisis
item.description: Brisbane Broncos legend Cameron Smith has suggested that the club's young talent, Cameron Bukowski, could step into the hooker role as the team navigates an ongoing injury crisis. With key players sid...

item.title: Justice Varma resigns amid cash row; Congress criticises government’s delay in women’s reservation
item.description: Justice Yashwant Varma, currently facing an inquiry over an unaccounted cash incident, has tendered his resignation from the Allahabad High Court, submitting it to President Droupadi Murmu. This resig...

item.title: PMDC expresses concern over suspected suicide of medical student in Mirpurkhas due to harassment
item.description: The Pakistan Medical and Dental Council (PMDC) has expressed serious concern regarding the suspected suicide of a third-year medical student from Mirpurkhas. The 21-year-old student tragically passed ...

item.title: 62-Year-Old Man from Tiruchi District Arrested for Allegedly Killing His 34-Year-Old Son During a Family Quarrel
item.description: In a tragic incident that took place on Thursday night in Vadugapatti village under the Manapparai police station limits in Tiruchi District, a 62-year-old man named S. Mariaraj was arrested on Friday...

item.title: Man jailed for eight years for culpable homicide after wife took her own life following domestic abuse
item.description: Lee Milne, aged 40, has been sentenced to eight years in prison, with an additional three-year extended sentence, after being convicted of culpable homicide in a landmark case in Scotland. His wife, K...
